dataset: CAMEO Data Manager Police Department Resources

pi_items.source: https://maplewoodpd.org/contact-us - No address matches found for '475 Civic Center Drive' in Maplewood, NJ search results
https://maplewoodpd.org/ - Maplewood is located in Essex County, New Jersey
https://www.unitedstateszipcodes.org/07040/ - ZIP Code 07040 is the correct code for Maplewood, NJ
https://maplewoodpd.org/contact-us - Main phone number for Maplewood Police Department
https://www.maplewoodnj.gov/Home/Components/StaffDirectory/StaffDirectory/67/21 - Albert Sally is the Chief of Police (sworn in 2022). Robert Flanagan is not listed.

https://www.maplewoodnj.gov/government/maplewood-police-department - Search found staffing structure (1 Chief, 1 Deputy Chief, up to 2 Captains, up to 4 Lieutenants, up to 11 Sergeants, patrol officers as needed) but no specific total of 47
Cannot verify Windows file path without system access. Scripts reference this path as expected location.

privileged_info_summary: The Maplewood Police Department's actual address is 1618 Springfield Ave. in Maplewood, NJ 07040, with phone number (973) 762-3400. The current Chief of Police is Albert Sally. CAMEO Data Manager is a real EPA/NOAA software suite for emergency planning (version 4.5.1 released December 2025). The task data is primarily synthetic, using a non-existent address (475 Civic Center Drive) and an incorrect police chief name (Robert Flanagan instead of Albert Sally). No authoritative source confirmed 47 officers for the department.
